full_text:
Zhang Lu (Gongqi) 張魯 (公祺)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Lu (張魯), styledGongqi (公祺). Controller of Hanzhong before surrendering to Cao Cao in 215. Zhang Lu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Lu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
